name: Spinach and Orzo Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook orzo according to package directions; drain.
2. Combine eggs, orzo, 1/2 cup spaghetti sauce, and Parmesan cheese in a bowl.
3. Spray a 9-inch pie plate with nonstick spray.
4. Spread the orzo mixture over the bottom and up sides of the pie plate to form a shell.
5. Cook spinach according to package directions; drain well.
6. In another bowl, stir together spinach, ricotta cheese, and nutmeg.
7. Spoon into the bottom of the pasta-lined pie plate.
8. Spread remaining spaghetti sauce over the spinach layer.
9. Cover the edge of the pie with foil.
10. Bake in a 350°F oven for 30 minutes.
11. Sprinkle shredded mozzarella cheese on top.
12. Bake for 3-5 more minutes, or until cheese melts.
13. Let stand for 5 minutes before serving.
Serving size: 342 calories, 10g fat, 52mg cholesterol
